scores.justification: The agent listed all tickets without using the `--since` flag to filter by a specific time window; instead, it manually parsed timestamps in Python after fetching the full dataset.
The agent never attempted to use the `--since` flag, so there was no error to recover from and no demonstration of handling the terse 'invalid date' error.
The agent compared four distinct time windows (Mar 28–Apr 3, Apr 4–10, Apr 11–17, and Apr 18–24) to show the trend in escalations across multiple weeks.
The final paragraph provides concrete counts (3, 7, 3, and 1 escalations for each week respectively) and a clear conclusion that escalations are down this week.
